lines.text: Next is the Jobs desk, every job across the corridor in one list.
This is where most of your work happens, so it's worth understanding exactly how it's laid out.
This banner at the top is the most important thing on the page, it tells you how many jobs are waiting for your action right now.
Think of it as your to-do list, if that banner is empty, every job is moving on its own.
Nguzo controls three gates, verifying permits, confirming payment, and approving execution. Nothing moves past them without you.
lines.arg: verify permits, confirm payment, approve execution

lines.text: Those three gates are the entire reason clients and suppliers trust this platform, so we'll action all three.
Any job needing your hand is flagged with an amber action tag, so you never miss one in the list.
Each row also carries its own stage tracker, showing exactly how far along that job is at a glance.
So you can scan the whole corridor and instantly see what's waiting, what's moving, and what's done.
Let's open a job that's waiting on us, and action it properly.
